title: Aggregator counts misleading when ingest sampling is enabled
scenario: User cites 'Datadog shows 5000 ERRORs in the window'. Datadog has 10% logs sampling on this index — real count is approximately 50000.
expected_finding: Skill must inspect aggregator sampling configuration before quoting counts, scale by sampling rate, and document sampling in Execution Status: Coverage. Untreated sampling assumptions are an Open Question, not a confident claim.
